headline: 3 Reasons We’re Fans of Texas Pacific Land (TPL)
summary: Since April 2021, the S&P 500 has delivered a total return of 68.6%. But one standout stock has more than doubled the market - over the past five years, Texas Pacific Land has surged 148% to $426.79 per share. Its momentum hasn’t stopped as it’s also gained 36.4% in the last six months, beating the S&P by 31%.
